meta.defaultTitle: Amity Palm Beach | Medical Detox & Addiction Treatment West Palm Beach FL
meta.defaultDescription: Medical detox and addiction treatment in West Palm Beach FL. Most PPO plans accepted. Same-day admission available.

process.quote: The hardest part of asking for help is making the first call. Everything after that — we handle. Our job is to make recovery feel possible from day one.
process.author: Jane Doe, LMHC

testimonial.quote: Detox is not just about getting through withdrawal safely. It's about building enough trust in those first days that a person believes recovery is worth fighting for. That's what we build here.
testimonial.author: Jane Doe 1

insuranceLogos.heading: Your Insurance Is Probably Already on This List
insuranceLogos.body: Most PPO plans cover the full cost of detox and residential treatment. Our admissions team verifies your benefits within minutes — no commitment required.

accommodations.body1: That life is closer than you think. At Amity Palm Beach, mornings start with clarity — not cravings. Our West Palm Beach facility is designed to make the early days of recovery feel safe, supported, and genuinely hopeful.
accommodations.heading2: Clinical Excellence. Real Compassion. Zero Judgment.
accommodations.body2: Our therapists don't just treat symptoms — they treat people. Every client receives an individualized plan built around their history, their goals, and their pace. Dual diagnosis, trauma-informed care, and holistic therapies are available from day one.

facilities.name: Amity Palm Beach
facilities.description: Medically supervised detox and residential treatment in a peaceful coastal setting. Joint Commission accredited with 24/7 clinical oversight.

facilities.name: Partner Facility
facilities.description: We partner with leading treatment centers to ensure continuity of care at every level of recovery.

facilities.name: Partner Facility
facilities.description: From detox to long-term residential care, our network ensures you receive the right level of support wherever you are.

breakTheAddiction.heading: You Don't Have to Figure This Out Alone
breakTheAddiction.body: Addiction is isolating. Recovery doesn't have to be. Our admissions team is available 24/7 — no judgment, no pressure, just honest answers about your options and what treatment looks like at Amity Palm Beach.
